message:
fix: Anthropic web search works without function tools

The tools block was gated on includeTools (derived from len(req.Tools) > 0),
so when WebSearch was true but no function tools were present, the
web_search_20250305 server tool was never sent. Changed both Complete()
and Stream() to enter the tools block when includeTools || req.WebSearch,
with function tools gated separately on includeTools inside the block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
